creator: ganael.laplanche@martymac.com
text:
On Thu, 10 Jun 2010 00:20:08 UT, Edwin Groothuis wrote

Hi Edwin,

> Find attached a patch that fixes dependencies for archivers/par2cmdline-tbb.
>
> I have also fixed devel/tbb to make it install the .so files the good way
> (.so.version + a .so link to that file).

Please note that I've just submitted ports/147870 which updates devel/tbb to
v3.0, as well as archivers/par2cmdline-tbb. So please ignore this thread, which
is superseded by ports/147870.

Best regards,

Ganaël LAPLANCHE
ganael.laplanche@martymac.org
http://www.martymac.org
